title: anthyllis alpestris subsp. baldensis
intro: Anthyllis alpestris subsp. baldensis, also known as Alpine kidney vetch, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anthyllis alpestris subsp. baldensis include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as acting as a natural diuretic to help with urinary issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
